overview.Name: Digitalbridge Group Inc
overview.Description: Colony Capital, Inc. (NYSE: CLNY) is a leading global investment firm with a legacy of identifying and capitalizing on key secular trends in real estate. The company is headquartered in Los Angeles with key offices in Boca Raton, New York, and London, and has over 350 employees across 20 locations in 11 countries.
overview.Address: 750 PARK OF COMMERCE DRIVE, BOCA RATON, FL, UNITED STATES, 33487
